hero-title:
Reviving the heart of your business
for unstoppable growth.
hero-sub: We eradicate business arrhythmia. An External Board of Directors centralizing your finances, legal affairs, and marketing under one unified 360° ecosystem.
hero-oneliner: We formalize your business, fix your finances, and get you clients. All in one.
section-title-problema:
98.5% of Dominican MSMEs
suffer the same arrhythmia
section-sub-problema: Critical symptoms that slow down every heartbeat of your business:
card-1-text: Disconnected processes, teams without strategic direction, and resources consumed without visible return.
card-2-text: Operations outside the legal framework that block access to credit, bids, and formal markets.
card-3-text: Absence of effective online presence and digital tools that in today's market are oxygen, not luxury.
section-sub-solucion: Three pillars. One intervention. Irreversible results.
panel-r-desc: We inject new identity and cutting-edge technology into the core of your business:
panel-c-desc: Your financial health and legality, armored to compete at the highest level:
panel-p-desc: Omnichannel marketing systems combining high-conversion digital advertising and custom physical printing in our own workshops:
section-sub-paquetes: Every business has its own heartbeat. We choose the right treatment.
junta-title: WE CREATE: Your External Board of Directors
junta-text: With our 360° Agency, we reconfigure your business. We integrate financial direction (CFO), legal strategy, and marketing (CMO) into one unified channel. You get an executive team driving your profitability month after month, without the high costs of a traditional executive payroll.
section-sub-contacto: A free diagnosis can be the first heartbeat of a completely different business.
ph-message: Tell us briefly about your company and the challenge you face...
qr-hint: With your camera or QR app
footer-desc:
360° Agency for Business and Digital Transformation
for MSMEs in the Dominican Republic.
footer-copy: © 2026 RCP Services. All rights reserved. Made with ❤️ in Santo Domingo, D.R.
careers-sub: We're looking for independent professionals passionate about business transformation. Work per project, with full autonomy, from anywhere.
careers-why-text: We operate under a collaborative economy model: no fixed employees, we assemble teams of specialists per project. You decide when, where, and how to work.
careers-val1-text: Choose your own hours and workplace. No time tracking, no exclusivity. Be your own boss.
careers-val2-text: Each collaboration is defined by concrete deliverables. Know exactly what to deliver and when to get paid.
careers-val3-text: Transform real businesses. Every project directly impacts Dominican entrepreneurs' lives.
careers-role1-text: Lawyers experienced in business formalization, ONAPI, DGII, One-Stop-Window, and government procurement.
careers-role2-text: Accountants and financial analysts expert in audits, restructuring, and tax planning for MSMEs.
careers-role3-text: Specialists in Meta Ads, Google Ads, SEO, CRM, Martech automation, and content strategy.
careers-role4-text: Web developers, AI engineers, UX/UI designers, and automation specialists with AI tools.
careers-step1-text: Send us your resume and portfolio through the form. Tell us your specialty and experience.
careers-step2-text: We review your profile and, if there's a match, we invite you for a brief conversation.
careers-step3-text: We assign you projects based on your specialty. Sign a collaboration agreement and start.
careers-standards-text: We guarantee quality through standardized processes, thorough documentation, and zero-critical-error deliverable audits.
careers-std1-text: Every process has a standard operating procedure with clear, replicable instructions.
careers-std2-text: Checklist system with zero critical errors policy before every client delivery.
careers-std3-text: All collaborators sign NDAs to protect our clients' information.
careers-cta-sub: Send us your profile and we'll contact you when there's a project for you.
careers-cta-hint: Send your resume and portfolio to info@rcp.services indicating your area of expertise.
about-title:
We are the strategic oxygen
for your business
about-sub: A 360° Agency that centralizes revitalization, consulting, and promotion under an artificial intelligence ecosystem for Dominican MSMEs.
about-mision-text: Business arrhythmia is the set of symptoms that prevent an MSME from growing: low productivity, informality, and digital blindness. RCP Services was born to eradicate it. We operate as an External Board of Directors that integrates financial direction (CFO), legal strategy, and marketing (CMO) into a single unified channel, without the costs of a traditional executive payroll.
about-val1-text: The client seeks to delegate the stress of growth and bureaucracy to regain control of their time and business.
about-val2-text: Centralization of procedures, turnkey growth management, and complete financial restructuring.
about-val3-text: Brand coherence, eligibility for government bids, and total operational peace of mind.
about-ocean-text: Through the ERAC framework, we redefine the value frontier, moving away from traditional agencies.
erac-e-text: The friction of hiring multiple isolated providers.
erac-r-text: Time spent on administrative micromanagement and legal bureaucracy.
erac-a-text: Focus on real profitability (ROI) and technological integration with AI.
erac-c-text: A comprehensive External Board of Directors in a single unified channel (360° Agency).
about-model-text: Our Business Model Canvas shows how every piece of the ecosystem works in sync.
bmc-seg-text: Dominican MSMEs requiring formalization, profitability, and aggressive digitalization.
bmc-channels-text: Omnichannel environment: Web, social media, CRM, in-person meetings.
bmc-rel-text: Long-term collaborative partnership (LTV) as strategic allies.
bmc-rev-text: One-time payments (Setup), hybrid models, and recurring retainers.
bmc-resources-text: Multidisciplinary expert talent and Artificial Intelligence infrastructure.
bmc-partners-text: MICM, MSME Centers, Ventanilla Única, ONAPI, DGII, Chamber of Commerce, Promipyme.
about-law-text: RCP Services acts as the technical bridge to formalization, aligning MSMEs with the State to unlock high-impact benefits.
law-1-text: Access to the mandatory government procurement reserve under Law 488-08.
law-2-text: Access to preferential credit through Promipyme and formal banking.
law-3-text: Direct connection with MICM and MSME Centers to access funds and support programs.
media-sub: Corporate video, strategic podcast, and resources that inspire the revival of your business.
media-video-desc: Discover how we transform Dominican MSMEs with our comprehensive revitalization, consulting, and promotion ecosystem.
media-video-note1: Presentation of the R·C·P ecosystem and its impact on MSMEs
media-video-note2: Case studies of the 360° Agency in the Dominican Republic
media-video-note3: Our value proposition and market differentiation
media-podcast-title: Pretotyping and the real cost of growth
media-podcast-desc: A deep conversation about business strategy, idea validation, and how to reduce risks before investing in your business growth.
media-podcast-name: Pretotyping and the real cost of growth
media-podcast-note1: Pretotyping techniques to validate ideas before investing
media-podcast-note2: "Fake Door" experiment: Landing Page to measure Initial Interest Level (IIL)
media-podcast-note3: "Wizard of Oz" MVP: Hyper-personalized execution to validate Product-Market Fit
media-podcast-note4: How RCP Services applies strategic validation in every project
media-cta-sub: Schedule your free 360° diagnosis and begin your transformation.
section-sub-ecosistema: Leave fragmented software behind. We install a private, unified digital core in your business.
eco-card-1-desc: Private digital infrastructure. You own your data and operations entirely.
eco-card-2-desc: Automate sales, inventory, invoicing, and CRM in one single channel.
eco-card-3-desc: AI assistants trained locally with your manuals and company policies.
eco-card-4-desc: Generate logos, banners, and marketing assets with private AI.
eco-card-5-desc: Integrated WhatsApp and Telegram bots that answer clients 24/7.
eco-card-6-desc: Control panel with real-time key metrics: CAC, LTV, and ROI.
eco-layers-sub: Each layer of our ecosystem works in perfect sync for your business:
cat-sub: Choose one of our optimized strategic packages or select individual blocks a la carte to create an experience completely tailored to your business.
cat-filter-title: What stage is your business in?
cat-filter-sub: Select your stage to see the ideal recommendation from our leopard instinct.
cat-stage1-desc: I want to formalize and launch
cat-stage2-desc: Looking to organize and boost sales
cat-basico-short: Solid legal, fiscal, and visual foundations to start strong.
cat-avanzado-short: Total integration of the centralized ERP/CRM and active digital marketing.
cat-premium-short: Absolute digital sovereignty, Private Enterprise AI, and Executive Dashboard.
cat-feat-11: Centralized Inventory, Purchasing, and Sales control
cat-feat-18: Corporate chatbots trained with your handbooks
cat-custom-sub: Select the service blocks that your business needs right now. Add them to your cart to estimate the investment range.
block-r4-desc: Implementation of local AI agents to automate replies, classify emails, and manage operational tasks without human intervention.
block-r5-desc: Definition of corporate values, coexistence manuals, and agile methodology training for dynamic teams.
block-r6-desc: Deep analysis of customer touchpoints with your brand, identifying bottlenecks and designing delight workflows.
block-c5-desc: Legal drafting and review of contracts with clients, suppliers, non-disclosure agreements, and armored terms of service.
block-c6-desc: Monthly management of accounting, bank reconciliation, ledger preparation, and financial health reports.
block-c7-desc: Technical review of employment contracts, TSS compliance with the Ministry of Labor, and litigation risk mitigation.
block-p9-desc: Complete online store with shopping cart, local payment gateway (CardNet or similar), and automatic ERP inventory integration.
block-p10-desc: Monthly production and editing of dynamic high-fidelity vertical videos, tailored to capture attention and go viral.
block-p11-desc: Production and installation of outdoor billboards, banners, large backdrops, and high-durability exterior signage.
block-r1-desc: Primary logo, corporate color palette, typographies, and basic brand manual.
block-r2-desc: Complete brand redesign, advanced identity manual, institutional stationery, and optimized digital assets.
block-r3-desc: Structuring and digitizing key workflows of your company into agile operational manuals.
block-c1-desc: Legal constitution: ONAPI Name registration, Chamber of Commerce Mercantile Registry, and DGII RNC.
block-c2-desc: Legal protection of your brand name or logo in ONAPI, including government fees and complete legal management.
block-c3-desc: Evaluation of financial and tax status and structuring an optimal tax plan to reduce contingencies.
block-c4-desc: Obtaining RPE and general/female MSME certification, plus strategic advice for applying to government purchases.
block-pd1-desc: Ultra-fast landing page, optimized to capture prospects, integrated with CRM and database.
block-pd2-desc: Design, targeting, and monthly optimization of paid advertising to generate qualified leads and sales.
block-pd3-desc: Installation and configuration of the CRM module in Corporate ERP with automated capture and follow-up flows.
block-pd4-desc: SEO optimization on Google Maps, Search Console, and local business listing to capture Dominican clients.
block-pi1-desc: Design and printing of luxury business cards, letterheads, institutional folders, and envelopes.
block-pi2-desc: Custom design and high-quality vinyl wrapping for commercial vehicles or corporate fleet.
block-pi3-desc: Corporate design and production of embroidered/printed uniforms, caps, mugs, and promotional articles.
block-pi4-desc: Acrylic, light-box, or vinyl facade design and installation for your brick-and-mortar commercial local.
cart-empty: Select blocks on the left to build your quote.
sched-sub: Choose an open slot in our calendar. We will analyze your company in a 45-minute call via Google Meet.
sched-pitch: "We will analyze your business heartbeats in finances, marketing, and legal operations. We'll provide a clear renovation proposal."
sched-select-time: Available Time Slots for this Date:
sched-select-day-first: Select a working day on the calendar to see available slots.
form-message: What main pain or arrhythmia do you want to eradicate?
sched-success-desc: We have booked your spot on Google Calendar. A Google Meet link and confirmation details have been sent to your email.
cookie-text: 🍪 We use analytics cookies to improve the site. We do not share your data.
cookie-cat-essential-desc: Required for the site to function. Cannot be disabled.
cookie-cat-analytics-desc: Help us understand how you use the site to improve it. Anonymous and aggregated data.
cookie-cat-marketing-desc: Allow us to measure the effectiveness of advertising campaigns (Meta Ads, Google Ads).
careers-success-desc: Your profile has been registered. We will contact you for future projects.
